name: unifi-mcp
description: UniFi network management via MCP tools. Monitor devices, clients, network health, firewall rules, and perform management operations.

settings.name: UniFi Controller URL
settings.description: URL of your UniFi controller (e.g., https://192.168.1.1:8443)

settings.name: UDM Pro Mode
settings.description: Set to true if using a UDM Pro or UDM SE (default: true)
